workflow.name: Typesense HA existing
workflow.description: Bootstrap and validate Typesense HA from an existing automation runner and target inventory.

data.label: Prepare Typesense inventory
data.command:
set -euo pipefail
apt-get update
DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive apt-get install -y ansible sshpass
cat >/tmp/typesense-inventory.ini <<'INVENTORY'
[typesense]
10.31.125.11 role=search name=typesense-01
10.31.125.12 role=search name=typesense-02
10.31.125.13 role=search name=typesense-03
INVENTORY

data.label: Install Typesense container runtime
data.command:
set -euo pipefail
cat >/tmp/typesense-runtime.yml <<'PLAYBOOK'
- hosts: typesense
  become: true
  tasks:
    - ansible.builtin.shell: |
        if command -v docker >/dev/null 2>&1; then
          docker --version
          exit 0
        fi
        if command -v apt-get >/dev/null 2>&1; then
          apt-get update
          DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive apt-get install -y docker.io docker-compose-plugin
        elif command -v dnf >/dev/null 2>&1; then
          dnf install -y docker docker-compose-plugin
        elif command -v yum >/dev/null 2>&1; then
          yum install -y docker docker-compose-plugin
        fi
        systemctl enable --now docker
PLAYBOOK
ansible-playbook -i /tmp/typesense-inventory.ini /tmp/typesense-runtime.yml

data.label: Render Typesense cluster manifests
data.command:
set -euo pipefail
cat >/tmp/typesense-deploy.yml <<'PLAYBOOK'
- hosts: typesense
  become: true
  tasks:
    - ansible.builtin.file:
        path: /opt/octastack/typesense
        state: directory
        mode: "0750"
    - ansible.builtin.copy:
        dest: /opt/octastack/typesense/compose.yml
        mode: "0640"
        content: |
          services:
            typesense:
              image: typesense/typesense:27.1
              container_name: octastack-typesense
              restart: unless-stopped
              command: "--data-dir /data --api-key=change-me --enable-cors"
              ports:
                - "8108:8108"
              volumes:
                - data:/data
          volumes:
            data: {}
PLAYBOOK

data.label: Deploy Typesense cluster
data.command:
set -euo pipefail
cat >>/tmp/typesense-deploy.yml <<'PLAYBOOK'
    - ansible.builtin.shell: docker compose -f /opt/octastack/typesense/compose.yml pull
    - ansible.builtin.shell: docker compose -f /opt/octastack/typesense/compose.yml up -d
    - ansible.builtin.shell: docker compose -f /opt/octastack/typesense/compose.yml ps
PLAYBOOK
ansible-playbook -i /tmp/typesense-inventory.ini /tmp/typesense-deploy.yml

data.label: Document Typesense topology
data.command:
set -euo pipefail
cat >/tmp/typesense-topology.md <<'EOF'
# Typesense HA topology

Members:
- typesense-01: 10.31.125.11 (search)
- typesense-02: 10.31.125.12 (search)
- typesense-03: 10.31.125.13 (search)

This example deploys one Typesense container per member host. Replace the placeholder commands with vendor-supported clustering, TLS, backup, and failover automation before production use.
EOF
cat /tmp/typesense-topology.md

data.label: Validate Typesense cluster
data.command:
set -euo pipefail
ansible -i /tmp/typesense-inventory.ini typesense -b -m shell -a 'docker ps --format "{{.Names}} {{.Status}}"'
